avr_freertos_task_create.tooltip: Create an AVR FreeRTOS task and its task handle

avr_freertos_task_function.tooltip: Define the task function with an automatic FreeRTOS task loop

avr_freertos_task_delay_ms.tooltip: Delay the current task in milliseconds

avr_freertos_task_delay_ticks.tooltip: Delay the current task by FreeRTOS ticks

avr_freertos_task_delete.tooltip: Delete a task and clear its handle

avr_freertos_task_notify_from_isr.tooltip: Safely notify a task from an interrupt

avr_freertos_task_wait_notification.tooltip: Wait for the current task to receive a notification

avr_freertos_queue_create.tooltip: Create a FreeRTOS queue for task-to-task data transfer

avr_freertos_queue_send.message0: send to queue %1 data %2 type %3 wait %4 %5 ms
avr_freertos_queue_send.tooltip: Send one item to a queue using a typed temporary variable

avr_freertos_queue_receive_do.message0: receive from queue %1 type %2 into %3 wait %4 %5 ms
avr_freertos_queue_receive_do.tooltip: Receive from a queue and run blocks when successful

avr_freertos_queue_messages_waiting.tooltip: Get the number of queued items

avr_freertos_semaphore_create.tooltip: Create a binary semaphore, mutex, or counting semaphore

avr_freertos_semaphore_give_from_isr.tooltip: Safely give a semaphore from an interrupt

avr_freertos_attach_interrupt.tooltip: Create an Arduino external interrupt handler for FromISR blocks

avr_freertos_get_tick_count.tooltip: Get the current FreeRTOS tick count

avr_freertos_get_task_count.tooltip: Get the current number of tasks

avr_freertos_get_stack_high_water_mark.tooltip: Get a task's remaining stack high water mark
